# Chapter 8: Statistics for engineers  (~90 pp)

- 8.1 Summary statistics: mean, median, mode, variance, IQR (10)
- 8.2 Distributions: normal, log-normal, Weibull, Poisson, exponential (15)
- 8.3 Hypothesis testing in engineering context (15)
- 8.4 Confidence vs prediction intervals (10)
- 8.5 Bayesian intuition for the practitioner (12)
- 8.6 Sample size and statistical power (10)
- 8.7 P-hacking, garden of forking paths, and what to refuse (10)
- 8.8 Failure section: replication crises across engineering disciplines (8)

**Archetype**: uncertainty (deepened), failure (statistical malpractice).
**Project**: run a 30-trial experiment of the reader's choice; report properly.
**Exercises**: 35.
